steps.t: Gladhir can be found on the bridge to Bâr Húrin in Southern Ithilien. You should speak with Gladhir.
Derufin and Duilin can be found in Bâr Húrin. You should speak with Derufin and Duilin.
Anborn and Thurindol can be found inside the keep at Bâr Húrin. You should speak with Anborn and Thurindol.
